basic_details.job_title: DHS Dindigul Genetic Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The District Health Society, Dindigul (DHS Dindigul) has officially announced the Genetic Counsellor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official DHS Dindigul website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria, are up to 35 years of age, and hold a Bachelor's Degree in Sociology, Psychology, Social Work, Diploma in GNM, or B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized University or Institution can submit their offline applications until 09-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Sociology/Psychology/Social Work/Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing from a recognized University or institution
qualification.details: Bachelors Degree in Sociology/Psychology/Social Work/Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing from a recognized University or institution. Additionally, the candidate must belong to a tribal community, preferably from the same district, to ensure better understanding, communication and engagement with the target population in tribal areas.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Dindigul DHS Genetic Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dindigul.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Dindigul DHS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelors Degree in Sociology/Psychology/Social Work/Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing from a recognized University or institution. Additionally, the candidate must belong to a tribal community, preferably from the same district, to ensure better understanding, communication and engagement with the target population in tribal areas.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Dindigul DHS Genetic Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://dindigul.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the District Health Society, Dindigul (Dindigul DHS). It is a government job opportunity in the health sector of Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for which this recruitment is being conducted is Genetic Counsellor. This is a specialized role within the health society.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Genetic Counsellor?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Genetic Counsellor post in the District Health Society, Dindigul, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for Dindigul DHS Genetic Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for candidates to submit their offline application for the Genetic Counsellor post is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Dindigul DHS Genetic Counsellor recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their completed application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Genetic Counsellor?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelors Degree in Sociology/Psychology/Social Work/Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing. Additionally, belonging to a tribal community is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Genetic Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Genetic Counsellor post is 35 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Genetic Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Genetic Counsellor post will receive a salary of Rs. 21000 Per Month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Dindigul DHS Genetic Counsellor recruitment. Applications are free of cost.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Genetic Counsellor?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Genetic Counsellor post primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility and submitted documents.
